moments.title: The Open Championship Concludes
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale in Southport concluded yesterday, July 19th, seeing Ryan Fox win by one stroke.

angles.name: Final Round Buzz
angles.copy: What a finish at Royal Birkdale! The 154th Open Championship wrapped up yesterday, crowning a new Champion Golfer of the Year. Who was your standout player from the weekend?

angles.name: Golfing Glory
angles.copy: The Claret Jug has been lifted! Royal Birkdale played host to an unforgettable Open Championship. Did you follow the drama from Southport?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, 2026, celebrating its 20th anniversary with a diverse lineup of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Just three days until Latitude Festival takes over Henham Park! Who's heading to Suffolk for a weekend of incredible music, comedy, and culture?

angles.name: Suffolk's Big Weekend
angles.copy: The countdown is on for Latitude 2026! Henham Park is getting ready for its 20th anniversary celebration this weekend. What are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Big Love Festival Underway
moments.blurb: The Big Love music festival in South Wales is currently live this July, celebrating its 10th anniversary with over 140 bands and DJs in the countryside near Bristol and Cardiff.

angles.name: Welsh Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Big Love Festival is happening right now in South Wales! Celebrating 10 years of music, circus, and good times. Are you there? Let us know what you're loving!

angles.name: Local Love for Big Love
angles.copy: Our very own Big Love Festival is bringing the party to South Wales this week! So much amazing local talent on display for their 10th anniversary. Who are you going to see?

moments.title: Splendour Festival's Final Bow
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival at Wollaton Hall in Nottingham held its final event this past weekend, July 18-19, 2026, after 18 years, featuring a diverse lineup and a special 2-for-1 ticket offer.

angles.name: Farewell Splendour
angles.copy: It was the end of an era this weekend as Splendour Festival took its final bow at Wollaton Hall. What are your favourite memories from 18 years of Nottingham's biggest festival?

angles.name: Nottingham's Loss
angles.copy: Nottingham said goodbye to Splendour Festival this weekend. A huge thank you to everyone who made 18 years so special. The music lives on!

moments.title: Carlos Santana Turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for hits like 'Smooth' and 'Black Magic Woman', celebrates his 79th birthday today, July 20, 2026.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana! What's your favourite Santana track to get lost in that legendary guitar work?

angles.name: Santana's Sound
angles.copy: Feeling the rhythm today as Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th! From Woodstock to 'Supernatural', his sound is truly timeless. What's his best album?

moments.title: Kim Carnes Turns 81
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Kim Carnes, famous for her 1981 global hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', celebrates her 81st birthday today, July 20, 2026.

angles.name: Bette Davis Eyes Day
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the incredible Kim Carnes! Her distinctive voice gave us one of the biggest hits of the 80s. What's your favourite Kim Carnes song?

angles.name: Iconic Voice
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday to Kim Carnes! That unmistakable voice and 'Bette Davis Eyes' still sound as good as ever. What's your favourite 80s power ballad?

moments.title: Paul Cook Turns 70
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, the influential drummer of punk rock pioneers The Sex Pistols, celebrates his 70th birthday today, July 20, 2026.

angles.name: Punk Rock Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to Paul Cook of The Sex Pistols! The man who laid down the beat for some of punk's most iconic tracks. What's your favourite Sex Pistols anthem?

angles.name: 70 Years of Punk
angles.copy: Anarchy in the UK (and a birthday)! Paul Cook, drummer for The Sex Pistols, turns 70 today. Celebrate with some classic punk loud and proud!

moments.title: Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) Turns 78
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, famous for folk-rock classics like 'Wild World' and 'Father and Son', celebrates his 78th birthday tomorrow, July 21, 2026.

angles.name: Tomorrow's Folk Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the 78th birthday of the incredible Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam). His timeless songs continue to resonate. What's your favourite track from this folk icon?

angles.name: Wild World of Yusuf
angles.copy: Get ready to sing along! Tomorrow, the one and only Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) turns 78. Which of his classic tunes always gets you feeling nostalgic?

moments.title: George Clinton Turns 85
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, will celebrate his 85th birthday on July 22, 2026.

angles.name: Funk Master's Big Day
angles.copy: Get ready to get down! On Wednesday, the legendary George Clinton turns 85. What's your favourite Parliament-Funkadelic groove?

angles.name: P-Funk Power
angles.copy: 85 years of pure funk! George Clinton's birthday is coming up on Wednesday. Time to celebrate the master of Mothership Connection!

moments.title: Don Henley Turns 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of The Eagles, known for hits like 'Hotel California' and 'Desperado', celebrates his 79th birthday on July 22, 2026.

angles.name: Eagles Drummer's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to The Eagles' legendary Don Henley on Wednesday! Which of his iconic songs is your all-time favourite?

angles.name: Hotel California Hitmaker
angles.copy: He's got those 'Desperado' eyes! Don Henley turns 79 this Wednesday. Celebrate the Eagles frontman with a classic rock playlist!

moments.title: Selena Gomez Turns 34
moments.blurb: Singer and actress Selena Gomez, known for hits like 'Lose You to Love Me' and 'Come & Get It', celebrates her 34th birthday on July 22, 2026.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the incredible Selena Gomez on Wednesday! From Disney to chart-topping hits, she's done it all. What's your favourite Selena track?

angles.name: Celebrating Selena
angles.copy: It's Selena Gomez's birthday on Wednesday! The multi-talented star turns 34. What's your favourite Selena era or song?

moments.title: Slash Turns 61
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Slash, best known for his work with Guns N' Roses, will celebrate his 61st birthday on July 23, 2026.

angles.name: Guitar Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: On Thursday, the legendary top-hatted guitar hero, Slash, turns 61! What's your favourite Guns N' Roses riff that instantly makes you think of him?

angles.name: Sweet Child O' Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to Slash this Thursday! The man behind some of rock's most iconic solos. What's your ultimate Slash moment?

moments.title: Verdine White Turns 75
moments.blurb: Verdine White, the distinctive bassist and founding member of Earth, Wind & Fire, will celebrate his 75th birthday on July 25, 2026.

angles.name: Boogie Wonderland Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to 'Shine On' this Saturday as Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire turns 75! What's your favourite EWF track to get you dancing?

angles.name: Earth Wind & Fire Legend
angles.copy: The funk master turns 75 on Saturday! Verdine White, the incredible bassist from Earth, Wind & Fire. Which of their anthems is your favourite?

moments.title: Mick Jagger Turns 83
moments.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Can you believe it? On Sunday, the one and only Mick Jagger turns 83! What's your favourite Rolling Stones classic from the ultimate frontman?

angles.name: Stones Legend
angles.copy: He's still got the moves! Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday this Sunday. Get ready to 'Start Me Up' and rock out to some Stones!

moments.title: Roger Taylor Turns 77
moments.blurb: Roger Taylor, the iconic drummer and songwriter for Queen, will celebrate his 77th birthday on July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Queen's Drummer
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's legendary drummer, Roger Taylor, this Sunday! What's your favourite Queen track he wrote or sang lead on?

angles.name: A Kind of Magic Birthday
angles.copy: The beat of Queen turns 77 on Sunday! Celebrate Roger Taylor's birthday with a blast of 'A Kind of Magic' and more!

moments.title: UK Summer Heat Continues
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing well above average temperatures this summer, with England and Wales particularly warm and London forecasting highs of 24-28°C this week.

angles.name: Summer Heatwave
angles.copy: Another week of sunshine and warm temperatures across much of the UK! Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool as the summer heat continues.

angles.name: Staying Cool in the City
angles.copy: London's set for another warm week with temperatures hitting the high 20s! How are you keeping cool in the city heat?

angles.name: Devon's Sunny Forecast
angles.copy: Devon is looking at plenty of sunny intervals and mild temperatures this week! Perfect for enjoying our beautiful county. What are your plans?

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Underway
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays have begun or are starting this week across England, Wales, Scotland, and Northern Ireland, marking a key seasonal period for families.

angles.name: Kids Are Out!
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Many pupils across the UK are now officially on their summer holidays. What exciting plans do you have for the break?

angles.name: Welsh Summer Break
angles.copy: The summer holidays have officially kicked off in Wales! Time for family fun, beach trips, and making memories. What's on your agenda?

angles.name: Devon Summer Fun
angles.copy: School's out for summer in Devon! Wishing all our listeners a fantastic break filled with sunshine and adventures. What are your favourite local summer activities?
